accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text including the 120-day, 10-day, and 90-day timelines and OMB role.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; identification of this as amending Magnuson-Stevens is correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as establishing deadlines for spend plan processing tied to fishery disaster funding.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the specific amendments to Section 312(a)(6) of the Magnuson-Stevens Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 'if applicable' conditional for spend plan content requirements.

effective_dates.why: Notes the Act took effect January 4, 2025 upon approval.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all key provisions: 120-day submission deadline, 10-day review, incomplete plan notice, 90-day funding, OMB concurrent review constraint.

correct_entities.why: Magnuson-Stevens Act, OMB Director correctly identified.
